titleStmt.title: SII 7.77: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 77. (A.R. No. 72 of 1900). ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE FOOT OF THE VENKUNRAM HILL AT WANDIWASH, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. maitre gotre pavitre mahimavati haḷebīḍa
. ballāḷapṛthvīpāleṁdrasyānvavāye suma
tiravataran viṭhṭhalakṣoṇipālaḥ . ni śaṁ
kaṁ kuṁkaṇorvīṣvaghamuci mucukundāśrame rā
jyamuccaiḥ sthalyāṁ prābhānavalyāṁmaḷabhata
khiḷanādurgamākramya samyak . 1 . tadvaṁśa
mauktikamaṇeḥ śritakāmadhenoḥ kānhoji
nāma vahataḥ kṣitibharturaṁbā . ratnābhidhā vyaraca
dāśritarājamauḷiḥ jñāneśvarāryagurubhaktisu
sādhamuktiḥ . 2 . śrīśālivāhanaśakābhidha
vatsarāṇāṁ yāteṣu ṣoḍaśaśateṣu gataḥ parastāt .
Aṣṭādaśasvapi ca nirgaḷiteṣu varṣeṣvekonaviṁ
śa Iti yaṁ vidurīśvarābdam . 3 . tasmin Īśvaravatsa
re himaṛtau pauṣe ca māse tithau paṁcamyāṁ budhavāsa
re śatabhiṣajyṛkṣe ca pakṣe site . ratnākhyā dhavalā
calasya nikaṭe sā śaivagaṁgātaṭe kānhojīkṣiti
pālakasya jananī kailāsamāsādayat . 4 . Ārā
maṁ dhavalagirerupatyakāyāṁ Adhvanyaśramaharamaṁ
ḍapābhirāmaṁ . mārtaṁḍānvayatilakotha mātṛbhaktyā
kānhojikṣitipatirātanonmanojñaṁ . 5 . Ātre
yagotrajanuṣā viduṣāṁ matena śrīvekaṭāryamakhi
nā raghunāthasūreḥ . putreṇa śeṣagirināthapadābja
bhājā ślokā Ime viracitāḥ suciraṁ jayaṁtu . 6 .
Digital edition of SII 7.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
